events.title: Israeli Strikes in Lebanon Intensify, 51 Killed in 24 Hours
events.desc: Israeli attacks in southern Lebanon have significantly escalated, resulting in the deaths of 51 individuals within the past 24 hours. This brings the total reported casualties to 552 since April 16, raising concerns about regional stability.

events.title: Israeli Forces Strike Gaza, Killing Three and Undermining Ceasefire
events.desc: Israeli strikes in the Gaza Strip have resulted in the deaths of at least three Palestinians, including two members of Hamas-run police. This violence highlights the precarious nature of the U.S.-brokered ceasefire.

events.title: Iran Rejects U.S. Peace Proposal; Warns of Renewed Hostilities
events.desc: U.S. President Donald Trump has declared Iran's response to a U.S. proposal aimed at ending the ongoing conflict 'totally unacceptable.' This rejection increases the likelihood of further hostilities, as Iran has also warned against new U.S. strikes and foreign naval presence in the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Iran Sends Response to U.S. War-Ending Proposal via Pakistan
events.desc: Iran has submitted its response to a U.S. proposal aimed at concluding the ongoing war to Pakistan, acting as a mediator. According to sources, this phase of negotiations will focus solely on a cessation of hostilities in the region.

events.title: Car Bombing and Ambush Kill Twelve Policemen in Pakistan
events.desc: A car bombing targeting a police post in Bannu, northwestern Pakistan, followed by a militant ambush, has resulted in the deaths of twelve police officers. Security officials fear further casualties among the 15 officers believed to have been on duty at the time.

events.title: South Korea Investigates 'Unidentified Objects' Striking Ship in Hormuz
events.desc: South Korea is investigating an incident where two unidentified objects struck a Korean-operated cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz on May 4. This incident adds to the growing maritime security concerns in the region.

events.title: Russia Claims Ukraine Violated Truce Over 1,000 Times
events.desc: Russia has accused Ukraine of committing over 1,000 truce violations since a three-day ceasefire went into effect on Saturday. The claim comes as Russia reports three Ukrainian deaths in the past 24 hours.

events.title: Iran Detracts from Police Infrastructure Damage Reports
events.desc: Bellingcat has documented damage or destruction to at least 80 police stations and Basij paramilitary infrastructure in Iran during the first three weeks of the U.S. and Israeli conflict. Experts suggest this is an effort to degrade the regime's 'repressive capacity'.

events.title: Two Waves of Bombing Detail Iran School Strike
events.desc: Bellingcat has verified two new videos showing multiple missile strikes on an IRGC compound and an adjacent school in Minab, Iran, in late February. The videos, released by Iran's Ministry of Foreign Affairs, provide further details on the attack.

events.title: Iran May Offer Assurances on Nuclear Facility Usage
events.desc: Iran is reportedly open to negotiating assurances regarding the use of its nuclear facilities, though it is expected to maintain its uranium stockpile and not allow it to be moved.

events.title: UK, France to Host Defense Ministers Meeting on Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The UK and France will co-chair a multinational meeting of over 40 nations to discuss military plans for restoring trade through the Strait of Hormuz. This comes after Iran warned against sending warships to the region.

events.title: Israeli Weaponry Deploys Tiny Metal Cubes Causing Severe Internal Injuries
events.desc: Tiny tungsten cubes, deployed from Israeli bombs, are causing devastating internal injuries to individuals in Lebanon, mirroring the effects seen in Gaza. This raises serious humanitarian concerns.

events.title: Lebanon Reports 39 Fatalities from Israeli Strikes
events.desc: Lebanon has reported that 39 individuals were killed in recent Israeli strikes, indicating a continued exchange of fire between Israel and Hezbollah despite a recently announced ceasefire agreement.

events.title: Trump to Discuss Iran with Xi Jinping Amidst Ongoing Conflict
events.desc: U.S. President Donald Trump plans to discuss Iran with Chinese President Xi Jinping during his visit to China. Discussions are expected to cover Iran's oil purchases amidst the ongoing war and broader U.S.-China relations.

events.title: US Warns It Will 'Blow Up' Anyone Approaching Iran's Enriched Uranium
events.desc: President Donald Trump stated that the U.S. is monitoring Iran's enriched uranium and will take military action against any entity attempting to approach it. This declaration underscores U.S. policy regarding Iran's nuclear program.
